    labelThe Cult: Part 6 (0-0)
    titleThe Cult: Part 6
    majorTypestatic
    spawneruk2nrh5p-USmdpkIPHqglQ

    dropHv_pnr0R60aicAYlXQkSAQ
    keykXjTL030wUGA8yMYOrfAHg
    descriptionJane: “Looks like we are in trouble, meet me at Melenda in Arrenius, also, I have someone else here that you might have a score to settle with.”
    mustBeInorderYes
    minLvl0
    completeDescriptionJane: “I knew I couldn't trust him so I waited for him at the warp gate while you recycled the engine parts. Then we had a serious talk and he confessed he is part of the Cult. According to the data the cult are experimenting on black holes and they are recruiting a small army of fanatics. My brother has been recruited as a fanatic purifier, they are know to attack and assassinate heretics in this system, I need to stop him” Cultist: “Hahahaha… It’s to late to save your brother and we knew you would fall for this trap, the planet has been surrounded by fanatics and now you will die, heretic!”
    addedBodies["Q5tnsm0aE0edmoeuCGxu0Q"]
    tableMissionTypes
    availableYes
    typetransport
    maxLvl0
